LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER SETH PAGE PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS (CCP 1094.5). THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED, WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS FOLLOWS: 1) THE BOARD OF APPEALS NEEDS TO BE NAMED AS RESPONDENT 2) UHC IS THE REAL PARTY-IN INTEREST. BOTH THE BOARD OF APPEALS AND UHC NEED TO BE SERVED; AND, 3) THE COURT NEEDS THE COMPLETE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD.JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Jul-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA UNEMPLOYMENT INSURANCE APPEALS BOARD Motion To Dismiss is taken off Calendar. Duplicate Entry. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Jul-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA UNEMPLOYMENT INSURANCE APPEALS BOARD'S Motion To Dismiss is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Jun-22-2015 Continued To Jul-17-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA UNEMPLOYMENT INSURANCE APPEALS BOARD'S Motion To Dismiss is continued to July 17, 2015, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, to give parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Parties must deliver courtesy copies of the papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 22, 2015 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Mar-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER SETH PAGE Notice of Hearing on Petition for Writ of Administrative Mandamus. Appearances: Petitioner Seth Page appearing in Pro Per and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, untimely service per CCP section 1005. Respondent served on March 1, 2010. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Nichole Rodich CSR # 11604

Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus (Ccp 1094.5)
Off Calendar Oct-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER SETH PAGE'S Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus (CCP 1094.5).
APPEARANCES: Seth Page, 216-7026 petitioner & moving party in propria persona; no other appearances.
RULING: Discussed and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - Denied without prejudice for the same reasons cited on August 24, 2009. That is, there is no showing that plaintiff named the Board of Appeals as the respondent and the Court does not have the complete administrative record. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus (Ccp 1094.5)
Off Calendar Aug-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER SETH PAGE Petition for Writ of Administrative Mandamus (CCP 1094.5). Seth Page Petitioner appearing in Court. (Mr. Page is represented by counsel who, due to a medical emergency, was not able to appear.) There are no other appearances. The Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: denied, without prejudice as follows: 1) the Board of Appeals needs to be named as respondent 2) UHC is the Real Party-in Interest. Both the Board of Appeals and UHC need to be served; and, 3) The Court needs the complete Administrative record. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus (Ccp 1094.5)
Off Calendar Aug-17-2009 Continued To Aug-24-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER SETH PAGE Notice of Hearing of Petition for Writ of Administrative Mandamus (CCP 1094.5). Appearances: Sean Donrad, Esq. Attorney at Law, (510) 387-2482, appearing for Petitioner and moving party. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and continues the matter to August 24, 2009 and further orders Petitioner is to provide the Court with a Proof of Service. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
